channel.title: Extraction Theory on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Extraction Theory on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Espresso Extraction Time: How Long Should a Shot Take and Why the Clock Lies
item.description: How long should an espresso shot take, where the clock actually starts, why time alone is a bad target, and how to read pre-infusion, channeling, and roast-specific timing windows. Complete extraction-time playbook for home baristas.
